message:
fix: 8 issues — settings, XSS, tests, ARIA, perf (#7609)

* fix: Go backend fixes for settings persistence, XSS, perf, and key race

- Persist autoUpdateEnabled/autoUpdateChannel in PlaintextSettings (#7571)
- Backfill missing boolean fields (aiEnabled) from older settings files (#7572)
- Sanitize card proxy Content-Type to block reflected XSS (#7573)
- Hoist compress.New handler to avoid per-request allocation (#7575)
- Use os.CreateTemp for unique temp filename during key bootstrap (#7577)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: ARIA labels, silent catch-drop, and 22 test failures

- Add aria-label to icon-only buttons across 7 components (#7569)
- Replace silent catch-and-drop in AlertsContext and styleConverter (#7576)
- Fix PVCStatus test: add missing useGlobalFilters and emitError mocks (#7574)
- Fix AlertsContext test: use localStorage.setItem directly so quota
  errors propagate instead of being swallowed by safeSet (#7574)
- Fix useMarketplace test: trigger storage event for installedSnapshot
  sync, set default mockApiGet for reconciliation (#7574)
- Fix useUniversalStats test: add missing useIngresses mock, update
  outdated ingress/endpoint assertions (#7574)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -250,6 +250,7 @@ export function FlappyPod(_props: CardComponentProps) {
           onClick={startGame}
           className="p-1.5 rounded hover:bg-secondary"
           title="New Game"
+          aria-label="New Game"
         >
           <RotateCcw className="w-4 h-4" />
         </button>

@@ -278,6 +278,7 @@ function PodSweeperInternal(_props: CardComponentProps) {
             onClick={() => newGame()}
             className="p-1.5 rounded hover:bg-secondary"
             title="New Game"
+            aria-label="New Game"
           >
             <RotateCcw className="w-4 h-4" />
           </button>
